join_order.notes: P21: 9.6M inner rows → bloom filter mandatory. Bloom is 11.5MB << L3 44MB → fits in cache. ~99% of 9.3M outer probes are bloom-negative (guaranteed non-match, aggregate immediately). Only ~1% (~93K) bloom-positive rows probe pre_atv_hash, avoiding P19 cache thrashing on 536MB index. Pre-built pre_atv_hash used via mmap for zero build cost (P11).

filters.method: dict_code_lookup: int16_t usd_code = find_code(uom_dict, 'USD') at runtime (C2)
direct int32_t compare: ddate >= 20230101 && ddate <= 20231231 (NOT epoch days — YYYYMMDD integer, C1 not applicable here)
filters.notes: Within USD segment ddate is sorted → zone maps skip ~73% of USD blocks. Skip condition: block.max_val < 20230101 || block.min_val > 20231231

bloom_filter.hash_formula: h1 = adsh*0x9E3779B97F4A7C15ULL ^ tag*0x517CC1B727220A95ULL ^ version*0x6C62272E07BB0142ULL; h2 = adsh*0xBF58476D1CE4E5B9ULL ^ tag*0x94D049BB133111EBULL ^ version*0xA9CB4D1F4E76AE3BULL
bloom_filter.build: parallel over pre rows with atomic OR writes (__atomic_fetch_or)
bloom_filter.purpose: pre-filter anti-join probes; bloom-negative = definitive non-match

pre_atv_hash_verification.slot_type: PreATVSlot { int32_t adsh; int32_t tag; int32_t version; int32_t row_id; }
pre_atv_hash_verification.purpose: exact anti-join verification for bloom-positive candidates only (~93K rows)

aggregation_map.value: struct { int32_t cnt; int32_t _pad; int64_t sum_cents; }
aggregation_map.notes: Thread-local maps sized for FULL group cardinality (C9). P20: always thread-local by default.

precision.rule: C29 MANDATORY: accumulate as int64_t sum_cents += llround(value * 100.0); output sum_cents/100 with abs(sum_cents%100) for two decimal places

parallelism.bloom_build_phase: parallel over pre rows, 64 threads, atomic OR for bit writes, no synchronization needed on probe
parallelism.scan_phase: parallel morsels over num zone-map-qualified blocks, per-thread thread-local aggregation
parallelism.merge_phase: single merge pass after thread barrier (P17, P20)

indexes.purpose: skip_blocks: skip blocks where max_val < usd_code || min_val > usd_code
skip_blocks: skip blocks where max_val < 20230101 || min_val > 20231231 (YYYYMMDD integers)
indexes.layout: [uint32_t num_blocks=395][ZoneBlock<int32_t> x 395], ZoneBlock={int32_t min_val; int32_t max_val; uint32_t row_count;}

indexes.purpose: join_lookup: exact anti-join verification for bloom-positive candidates only (P11, P19 mitigation)

execution_phases: data_loading: mmap num/(uom,ddate,value,adsh,tag,version).bin + pre/(adsh,tag,version).bin + indexes/(num_uom_zone_map,num_ddate_zone_map,pre_atv_hash).bin; load tag_dict, version_dict, uom_dict; selective madvise on zone-map-qualifying blocks only (P13, P14)
build_bloom: 64-thread parallel scan of pre adsh/tag/version columns; insert each (adsh_code,tag_code,version_code) composite key into 11.5MB bloom filter with atomic OR (P21)

scan_antijoin_aggregate: morsel-driven 64-thread scan of num; combined uom+ddate zone-map skip per block (C19); per qualifying row: bloom probe → if negative → aggregate to thread-local map; if positive → bounded probe pre_atv_hash → if not found → aggregate (anti-join pass) (C24, P19, P21)
aggregation_merge: merge 64 thread-local hash maps into single global map with single pass (P17, P20)
topk_sort: std::partial_sort to extract top 100 groups by cnt DESC (P6)
output: decode tag_code and version_code to strings (C18); format sum_cents as decimal (C29); write CSV
